text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I notice Silence Suzuka while walking in the hall.
She's looking rather under the weather.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Trainer. I'm all right. I just have a little
headache.
choice_data_list: Why don't you rest for a while?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I was thinking a nice run would make me feel
better. I don't wan—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Silence Suzuka clasps her head in pain.
